div.div: hybrid field · 5 dense archetypes + ~40 continuum · validated vs uniform-random null

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 791px; margin-left: 6px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.i: Stages 5, 11-13. The combinatorial fork reuses morphbox + cib to sample 268,435,456 combinations down to 120 consistent scenarios, then names archetypes and tests structure vs a null model.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
